subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf of the Primal Point and the Most Exalted Beauty, unto Whom my spirit, my essence, my being and my very identity belong [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطمئنه حضرت نقطه اولی و جمال اعلی روحی و کینونتی و ذاتی و هویتی له
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
